name: HL7 Interface Failure — Network Switch Port Error
description: Access switch port errors on VLAN 30 (HL7/Interface) cause HL7 message queue backup. Results tracker shows missing lab results, pharmacy ADT feeds stall, and clinical staff can't see orders in Epic.

events.description: Duplicate orders because results not visible
Staff logging in to check on missing data
Massive queue flush after port recovery

network_correlation.description: CRC errors and input errors on HL7 interface engine switch port cause TCP retransmissions and HL7 MLLP timeouts

params.description: Port connected to Bridges HL7 engine

events.description: CRC errors on Bridges interface engine port
Errors escalating — cable or transceiver degradation
Switch err-disables the port — HL7 engine completely offline

flow_anomalies.description: HL7 VLAN → Epic app tier drops to near-zero during outage
Massive queue flush — 50x normal HL7 traffic burst after recovery

indicators: CRC errors on switch port are the root cause — bad cable or SFP
HL7 NACK rate spikes exactly when port errors begin
Zero HL7 VLAN traffic during err-disable period confirms network cause
Queue flush burst after recovery is clearly visible in both HL7 and NetFlow data
Clinical impact (duplicate orders) starts 5 minutes after technical failure
